ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-06-2021 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-25-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion for San Francisco Public Guardian.

The Court noted that Mr. Kelly is not present. Ms. Mannion stated that she believes there are quite a few deficiencies in Mr. Kelly's petition, that there is no real property and that the property was sold during the course of the conservatorship. The Petition for Letters of Administration filed by Kirt Vivier is off calendar. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration filed the Public Guardian (subject to review of the order). Status on close of estate is set for May 25, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
